 TSI{0,1,2,3,5} are private tables used by Microsoft Visual TrueType (VTT)
tool to store its hinting source data.
TSI2 is the index table containing the lengths and offsets for the glyph
programs that are contained in the TSI3 table. It uses the same format as
the TSI0 table.
print_function
division
absolute_import)
ttLibZ
TSI0c
table_T_S_I__2Z
TSI3N)

__module__
__qualname__Z
dependencies
C/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/fontTools/ttLib/tables/T_S_I__2.pyr
__doc__Z
__future__r
fontTools.misc.py23Z	fontToolsr
getTableClassZ
superclassr
<module>
